title: Gauntlet Database World
description: Schema for database world definition YAML files that describe simulated database state.

description.description: Human-readable description of the database and its role in the scenario.

seed_sets.description: Named sets of seed data that can be loaded into the database. Each key is a seed set name.

seed_set.description: A named collection of table data used to pre-populate the database.

tables.description: Map of table name to its row data.

additionalProperties.description: Array of row objects for this table.

items.description: A single row represented as key-value pairs.
